data.content: Requested changes from implementation review: src/lib/terminal-manager.ts now appends [agent: <label>] to the Claimed and TAKE log lines at the three expected emission sites, but there is no direct automated assertion for that UI logging behavior yet. I verified build and typecheck pass in this checkout. I also ran bun test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts, and it currently fails before executing assertions with TypeError: vi.importActual is not a function, so I could not verify the relevant terminal-manager behavior through tests. Add a focused test that asserts the emitted terminal log lines include the selected agent label for both claim and take iterations, then rerun the affected sanity checks before re-review.
